children.name: The travel industry runs on outdated models built for their profit, not yours. Choose differently.
children.characters: The travel industry runs on outdated models built for their profit, not yours. Choose differently.

children.name: Every Booking
children.characters: Renting a seat on their platform

children.name: Others charge for every small piece.
children.characters: Others charge for every small piece.

children.name: Per-transaction fees, monthly subscriptions, support costs and hidden charges that never stop adding up. You bleed margins on every booking.
children.characters: Per-transaction fees, monthly subscriptions, support costs and hidden charges that never stop adding up. You bleed margins on every booking.

children.name: Your business depends on their infrastructure, their terms, their timeline. No control over your roadmap, your features or your future.
children.characters: Your business depends on their infrastructure, their terms, their timeline. No control over your roadmap, your features or your future.

children.name: GDS vs airline disputes, content negotiations and platform politics shut you down — even when you did nothing wrong.
children.characters: GDS vs airline disputes, content negotiations and platform politics shut you down — even when you did nothing wrong.

children.name: One transparent platform fee. No per-transaction costs, no surprise charges. Every margin you earn is yours to keep — always.
children.characters: One transparent platform fee. No per-transaction costs, no surprise charges. Every margin you earn is yours to keep — always.

children.name: Your platform. Your code. Your call.
children.characters: Your platform. Your code. Your call.

children.name: Complete source code ownership. Your brand, your servers, your customers. Build on your roadmap, your timeline, your terms.
children.characters: Complete platform ownership. Your brand, your servers, your customers. Build on your roadmap, your timeline, your terms.

children.name: GDS and NDC run in parallel — simultaneously. No aggregators, no markups, no blackouts. Best fare wins every time. ~23% avg savings.
children.characters: GDS and NDC run in parallel — simultaneously. No aggregators, no markups, no blackouts. Best fare wins every time. ~23% avg savings.

children.name: Agencies on 3rd-party GDS portals typically spend $1,200–$2,000/month in combined platform and per-booking fees. MaqqsedTravel starts at $250/month.
children.characters: Agencies on 3rd-party GDS portals typically spend $1,200–$2,000/month in combined platform and per-booking fees. MaqqsedTravel starts at $250/month.
